entry.title: Re: [SAP MDK] Retrieving Mobile's Domain name of the host
entry.content:
It works with

const platformModule = clientAPI.nativescript.platformModule; // Check whether the platform is web or mobile
const hostname = platformModule.isWeb ? window.location.hostname : context.getMobileServiceEndpointUrl();

Thanks @Bill for the input!

entry.title: Re: [SAP MDK] Retrieving Mobile's Domain name of the host
A question for CDS view keys
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Assume there is a DB table that has 3 fields, A B and C. A and B are string fields which are also DB keys. C is a GUID fields which is not a DB key.

And then assume I create 2 CDS view on this table: the first one is with key C, and the second one is with key C, A and B.

Which one is better from the performance point of view.

 

Regards,

Ming

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH...
entry.content: it is always the challenge to get business involvement -upgrade only needs them to retest their scenarios that already know and have tested from past, but reimplementation requires huge commitment from business as well as from IT. if Business is not ready for upgrade and reimplementation will have bigger issues to deal with.

entry.title: Re: Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi 

Please check note

2663532 - Details of PO/PR are not shown in My Inbox app - SAP S/4HANA 1809

It will help you

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: CDS view field date element alpha routine
entry.content: I updated the code, thanks for the reminding.

entry.title: How can post GRN with quantity exceeding of PO quantity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to discuss a scenario, if we created a PO for 100 quantity and the goods receipt is for 120. The GRN restricts that it cannot exceed 100. What is the possible solution so that we can post  120 quantity and also not have to edit the PO and how can we track this in the future that against this PO there was a GRN of 120 quantity. And obviously there will be an error on the invoice when posting. Please suggest a solution for this scenario.

entry.title: Using API of Business Objects
entry.content:
I want to ask if it is possible or if someone has experience using the api of business objects in the following use case.

I want to get data via REST-API requests in a common format (JSON, XML or else). I do not know which format is state of the art nowadays. Consuming a lot of data might be useful since JSON has a limitation of 1GB as far as I know. The consumed data is going to be a two-dimensional table with columns and rows.

The use case in steps.

1. User authenticates at system via API with predefined credentials or single sign on if possible

2. User asks to get a list of available universes granted to the user for usage

3. User asks to get all objects of one specific universe. The objects of a universe were prebuilt with "Information design tool".

4. User asks all or multiple objects from 3. and gets the data in JSON-Format to process it further.

Thank you very much in advance for the support

entry.title: Re: PO discount Condition not reflect in GRN
entry.content: Thank you for your response Sanan, after this seating system behavior is same as above.

entry.title: Kernel Patch to support TLSv1.3 - SAP Note 3318423
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We recently ran a security application to check for alerts and vulnerabilities in our VAR Solution Manager 7.2 SP 18. The report recommended enabling the TLSv1.3 protocol. According to SAP Note 3318423, this protocol is only supported in Kernel versions 793 and above (we're currently running Kernel 754 PL 300).

The note also mentions: "This note will be updated when a SAP Kernel patch becomes available, which adds support for the new protocol version TLSv1.3 to any SAP Kernel codelines prior to SAP Kernel 793."

Does anyone know when a patch will be released to support TLSv1.3 in SAP Kernel 754?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Issue regarding the missing home page for a specific...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please Enable Below service in you SAP GUI : 

SAP_ONLINE_LOOKUP_EXT_2405

 

Regards,

ADAPA

entry.title: Re: PO discount Condition not reflect in GRN
entry.content: Please share screenshot from the PO condition tab and also ZDIS control data screen.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order: Undo Deletion of Deleted Operations
entry.content:
Hello @anika_roeder ,

We are using S4 HANA 2022 FPS01, I used this functionality "Undo deletion" in GUI, but when I tried to use the same functionality in Fiori app "Change Maintenance Order", this functionality is not available.

Can you suggest me, how to use this functionality in Fiori / Web GUI

 

Best regards,

Avinash Chittem

entry.title: Upload .XML file to CPI endpoint
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario that want to upload XML file to CPI Endpoint. Is it possible or not? If it is possible please suggest

entry.title: Re: how to inject the clientId/secret to OAuth2UserTokenE...
entry.content:
Willem thank you for your help, it is working now with the with my complex scenario where I have a service and a separated approuter(2 mta.yaml, and 2 xs-app.json), I am not sure what was the fix, but after I undeployed and delete all the instances of my external app router, and of my service and deployed it all again it worked. I also have to do a small change in one of the xs-app.json, the welcome file was: welcomeFile": "/index.html", and I changed it to welcomeFile": "index.html". Now I am able to create correctly the destination from the mta.yaml of my service.

once again thanks for the guidance!!

entry.title: Re: PRD report returning blank output. Query returns data in PRD but not when I import
entry.content: If it's running properly in PRD, the issue is likely with your security statement in the query. Especially if you changed tables. I would take a look at that to ensure everything is set up properly there.

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content: First of all, is it a standard or custom program? If it's standard, contact SAP support. I suspect that it's due to the SAP specific "FOR ALL ENTRIES" which by definition cannot be optimized by the database. If you have many records, check if they can be archived via standard archiving programs.

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content: It is a custom program and I tried with Inner join(with full keys)/Subqueries also. But the performance is really bad.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Gurugram 2024 - Business AI Edition: Call for Speakers
entry.content: Great Initiative

entry.title: how to send information through wev hook FSM
entry.content: attached!

entry.title: Would anyone know if it is possible to set a recruit date previous to saved recruit date
Re: Information on different Depreciation Keys
entry.content:
Hi expert,

Can you explain more details between these depreciation keys? I don't understand clearly the app Depreciation Key: Display Details.

Thanks.

entry.title: Welcome to our SAP Learning MOOC course - Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite!
entry.content:
Dear course participants,

We warmly welcome you to the discussion forum of the course “Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite”

I am your host and the SAP Learning MOOC project manager for this course.  I worked closely with the subject matter experts to bring this course to you.

A special note of thanks to our course experts, Shilpa, Piyush, Udo, Sunny, Chaim, Marco and Karsten, who have dedicatedly worked on the course content from across all our SAP locations.

SAP Integration Suite, the enterprise integration platform as a service (iPaaS) that enables you to integrate, automate, and transform business processes with integration capabilities across SAP and third-party landscapes.

This course offers a concise yet comprehensive introduction to SAP Integration Suite, covering the key capabilities, the importance of a defined enterprise-wide integration strategy, and how you can leverage AI to modernize your business landscape.

The learning effort to complete this course is approximately 2 hours. Each lesson includes a video lecture and at the end of the course you can attempt the course quiz. 

Feedback and FAQ

We’d like to invite you to provide feedback on this course, the platform, and your overall experience with SAP Learning. Your input is important to us, as we’ll use it to improve the SAP Learning experience in the future:

  • You can provide feedback on lesson level with the smileys below the lesson videos.
  • Our “I like I wish” section is available in the course discussion forum, and we encourage everyone to post their thoughts on the course.
  • For technical and general questions, use the Feedback function in the top left corner of the page. You can find more information on the FAQ page.

During the course run, we invite you to post all your content related questions on this forum and our fellow learners, and content experts will be happy to discuss them with you.

We wish you the very best with the quiz and looking forward to your participation on the forum.

Good luck and happy learning!

Best regards,
Jayanthi
SAP Learning team

entry.title: Re: SlipStream Issue with QM02
entry.content: If there is no error in the browser console, then the problem may be related to tab merging. Try adding a script to the tab strip's onMergeError event to check if this is the case. Even a simple alert should be sufficient to confirm this.

entry.title: Clean up / Delete BTP subaccounts
entry.content:
Hi

We are new to BTP and are setting up the ABAP Custom Code Migration App.

We have been using the Discovery Centre mission + Cloud Integration Automation Service to do the setup and it really hasn't set it up as we'd like. For example, it's using AWS when we wanted to use Azure, it's not in the region we'd like, its created a new BTP subaccount when we had set up a subaccount on Azure, in the correct region, etc.

Since this is the only service we are currently using we would like to get the setup correct from the start. Is it reasonable delete all of the subaccounts and their contents? We could then start the Discovery Centre mission + Cloud Integration Automation Service processes again.

Thanks for your input and guidance.

Gavin

SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: Error in direct input(RCPTRA02) LSMW for Routing mass...
entry.content:
Could you set a breakpoint in the TEXT_UPDATE form of the LCPBDFTX include in the CPBD function group?

  • You could theoretically transform C\ 045 into a warning via Customizing (but then test the impact)

entry.title: GL - Transfer between companies - Cost center does not exist
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

My client has two companies and one cost accounting area (V_TKA01_GD). They transfered an employee from company 3702 to 3701. In GL accounting has two documents:

GL document 3701 - OK

GL document 3702 - Error

In GL document 3702 is showed the message KZ002 - cost object (cost center) XXX does not exist.

But cost center XXX exist and this error did not occur last month.

Cost center XXX is informed in infotype 0027 last month. Coster center master in infotype 0001 is another one, but there is no error in it.

How can I solve this problem? Any idea?

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content: Well that is certainly a relief. Any Idea on a timeline to get the Community Edition build service up and running?

entry.title: Re: How to Add Custom Header Text in Purchase Requisition

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Extensions & Integration QRC Q1 2024 Release
entry.content:
Dear Amanda

In the first part of your post, you explain that "In QRC Q1 2024, the API has been further extended to also support Master Data for Public Dimensions." 

And add this includes data access control. When trying to export data acces control of a public dimension (read and write column) are not exported.

We use the following type of URL :

 /api/v1/dataexport/providers/sac_public_dimensions/t.2:Profit_Center/PublicDimensionData

Can you confirm data access controls can be export using API ?

Thanks in advance

Kind regards

Emmanuel

entry.title: Re: MRP is not considering the lead time in MRP3
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/calculation-of-the-replenishment-lead-time/ba-p/13177388

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: Not sure what you mean - This is payload I am using - <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <root xmlns="http://example.com/a" ns2="http://example.com/b"> </root> What payload was used by you to test?

entry.title: call classe methods below in another class code
entry.content:
Hello.
I would like some help on how I can make two classes in code talk to each other, I want to create a Set Handeler of an ALV of a class that is further down in the code.
for exemple, in this code i have ALV in Report but i need set the handle in Control class, there are some on to call the method in below class in code?

 

 

 

 

CLASS cl_report DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: select,
      display.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: lt_mara TYPE TABLE OF mara.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS cl_report IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD select.
    SELECT *
      FROM mara
      INTO TABLE me->lt_mara.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD display.
    DATA: lo_alv TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
    TRY.
        cl_salv_table=>factory(
          IMPORTING
            r_salv_table = lo_alv
          CHANGING
            t_table      = me->lt_mara ).

      CATCH cx_salv_msg.
    ENDTRY.

*       Display ALV, verificando se deve ou não ser Popup.
    IF lo_alv IS BOUND.
*         DEFININ EVENTS
      DATA: o_events TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table.
      o_events = lo_alv->get_event( ).
      SET HANDLER cl_control->handler FOR o_events.

      lo_alv->display( ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS cl_control DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS: constructor,
      init,
      handler FOR EVENT link_click OF cl_salv_events_table.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: o_report TYPE REF TO cl_report.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS cl_control IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.
    CREATE OBJECT o_report.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD init.
    o_report->select( ).
    o_report->display( ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD handler.
    BREAK-POINT.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

INITIALIZATION.
  DATA: o_cntr TYPE REF TO cl_control.
  CREATE OBJECT o_cntr.
  o_cntr->init( ).

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content: Thank you for your reply, I'm using JCo 3.1.6 (2022-05-18) and I am using SapMachine 17 (64-bit). Is there any workaround if installing version 3.1.10 is not an option for business reasons?)

entry.title: Re: How to add custom fields in Standard Migration Object with Migration Object Modeler App
entry.content:
Your blog describes how to enhance an existing object  with enabled standard fields. For a limited number of objects additional standard fields can be added to an existing object. A custom field is per definition a field that was added using key user extensibility via the Custom fields app. Fields added via the Custom Fields app are added to the template automatically after creation when the user clicks on "Check for Custom Fields". There is no additional change necessary via the Model your migration object app. I propose to not use the term custom fields here, because it confuses people that are using information on how to add custom fields to an existing object. Those people should then have look into the SAP Help Portal: Overview | SAP Help Portal

BR

Frank

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Thank you both for your answers. We will take it into consideration. @christoph_bergemann I understand your advice, however our client is going to be using S4HANA 2023, so no cloud option unfortunately. EHS classic workaround to generate SDS and upload to product compliance is probably possible, but I am unsure if wise, because after a few years, it will be decommissioned... but will still give it some consideration. Also, I thought I read in the material that if you use product compliance, you cannot use EHS classic?

I have a question with regards to Dangerous Goods Management. I see that a lot of dangerous goods regulations are pre-loaded for activation. If there is a regulation that does not yet exist, and we create our own, I see the only option is to use a text based compliance pattern, rather than a content-based and seems limited. how does the classification process work in that scenario? I don't see any option to add for example UN lists? If not possible, can you advise the best approach in the business process to classify?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: MTA Parameter for Subaccount ID using CI/CD
entry.content:
Same problem as this described in this ticket: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mta-param

This time, we're using GitFlow strategy and thus only the CI/CD service. How is it possible to have a different variable for the subaccount id in the mta.yaml or mta extension as we have for cTMS?

@Dinu any suggestion for this?

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
For "business reasons" it is not an option to install JCo 3.1.10?
Because only the latest JCo standalone patch level is supported by SAP, using an older patch level assures not to be eligible to get support from SAP for your scenario.
Anyway, if you wish to use an older patch level, do so at your own risk, but then you also have to follow the installation instructions of the old version and not the ones for the latest patch level.
JCo 3.1.6 required the Microsoft Visual Studio 2013 C/C++ runtime libraries to be installed on the system, and not the Microsoft Visual Studio 2015-2022 C/C++ runtime libraries. Note that these 2013 libraries are meanwhile out of support by Microsoft and therefore also won't get any security patches anymore.
Not only because of this, using an older JCo version usually implies to accept security risks for your installation.

entry.title: Error in BC set activation
entry.content:
Hi,

I get an error when I try to activate business configuration set for MDG EAM 2023 version, how can I solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Number Range for Material Type
entry.content:
You Can try also by creating SNRO object and creating a different interval.
T-Code = SNRO
and consuming the SNRO object by using FM "NUMBER_GET_NEXT"

entry.title: Message no. R1228 is displayed when entering identical bank details
entry.content:
In the APP Manage Business Partner Master Data two identical Bank details are created & the following error is produced:

Message no. R1228

Diagnosis
Bank details must be unique in the validity period with regard to the key data country, bank number and account number.
If you want to create other bank details with an identical key, then the validity of the new bank details may not overlap the 
validity of the bank details that already exist.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Message no. R1228 is displayed when entering identica...
entry.content:
Adjust the validity periods of the identical bank details accordingly.

The validity date periods of the bank data cannot overlap

entry.title: SAP DM: Change between OEE reason codes which belong to the same time element time
entry.content:
I have set up different time elements and assigned them to the time element types. I also defined OEE reason codes and assigned them to the time elements. But now I have the issue that when I change a ressource from one OEE reason code to another one which belongs to the same time element type, the system doesn`t update the reason code. It remains with the original OEE reason code.

When i change to an OEE reason code which belongs to a different time element type, it works well. 

Do I miss any setting for that?

I am using an Order POD. To change the OEE reason code I am using the "ressource status with reason code Plugin".

entry.title: Re: Managing Encryption Keys and Certificates for Better Data Security
entry.content: Thank you for this helpful post! The Encryption Keys and Certificates feature is a game-changer for managing security assets and protecting sensitive information.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Rebate Processing (2R7) for multiple compa...

entry.title: Changing source of supply based on cumulative quantity
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement in my organisation regarding changing source of supply (vendors) based on cumulative quantity.

I know we can change source of supply in source list based on validity date to replce/discontinue a supplier and use another.

Our requirement is the source of supply shoudl automatically change to supplier 2 if cumulative quantity delivered by supplier 1 from start to end reaches to a certain quantity limit.

Is it possible in any SAP standard scenarios?

I tried putting breakpoint in given include but breakpoint is not getting hit. Also tried to put breakpoint on message but no luck. Program got executed & gave above set of errors. 

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: Web IDE sub menus not appearing
entry.content:

I am having the same problem, following the tutorial at https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-html5-module.html I am not seeing the menu structure as shown in the tutorial.

Please note that I've completed all the previous steps successfully as per this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-connecting-webide.html 

I've attached a screenshot of what my menu look like.

Need your expert help to resolve this issue please.

I also previously tried using Microsoft Visual Studio 2013 C/C++ runtime libraries and I still got the same errors. Thank you for your support!

entry.title: Re: Managing Encryption Keys and Certificates for Better Data Security
entry.content: Great blog, a succinct and easy to understand explanation of this important security feature of the application.

entry.title: How to Open different types of maintenance notes in batch with different types of priority?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I use SAP ECC 750 with some restrictions in my company (my user don't have all transactions screens or can't use scripting). Some transactions are personalized and the creation of maintenance notes is individual, using the IW21 screen. Is there a common screen or personalized to mass create different types of notes with different texts and different priorities, or can use a database or some sheets?

We are in a SAP integration project with Microsoft PowerApps and this ecosystem would have a long and prosperous life if this possibility existed.

TL;DR: How to Open different types of maintenance notes in batch with different types of priority.

entry.title: SAP HXE Web IDE sub-menus not appearing
entry.content:
Using the SAP HANA HXE on-premise located at https://hxehost:53075/ am trying to write some HTML5 code using WEB-IDE.

I am having a problem with WEB-IDE Sub-menus, following the tutorial at https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-html5-module.html I am not seeing the menu structure as shown in the tutorial.

Please note that I've completed all the previous steps successfully as per this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/xsa-connecting-webide.html

I've attached a screenshot of what my menu look like.

Need your expert help to resolve this issue please.

entry.title: Use of Secondary Index created on HDB is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
entry.content:
Dear All,
Index ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI exists in database system HDB, but why my program is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB ?

Here is my select query:
SELECT *
FROM ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
INTO TABLE lt_ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
WHERE location = 'BANGALORE'
%_HINTS HDB 'ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI'.

What is the mistake I am doing in the Select Query ?
Secondary IndexProgramExceptionThanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Cloud alternative of DESCRIBE FIELD dobj [TYPE typ [C...
entry.content:
Hi, you can try as follow:

 

DATA lo_element TYPE REF TO cl_abap_typedescr.

 

lo_element ?= cl_abap_elemdescr=>describe_by_data( <lfs_structure> ).

 

The Type is in the global atribute TYPE_KIND according to:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/en-US/abapdescribe_field.htm#!ABAP_ADDITION_1@1@

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: @Shilpa_Shankar That's where I ended up, see later posting describing it as a "fudge", spent a lot of time trying to use, @UI.textArrangement: #SEPARATE and attaching the Search to the Text, before adding a second Status field. Thanks for the feedback.

entry.content: How to edit Greetings text on homepage in Sap Successfactor?

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me Guides for Partner Roles
entry.content: What permissions are needed for Partner Super Admin Partner and SAP for Me Administrator contact to view all employees in their organization that have passed certifications in SAP Fieldglass. I can not find this on site. Will someone please post a link? Thank you, Roxy

entry.title: SAC Rolling 12 Months with Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve reviewed various community posts and KBAs regarding rolling 12-month calculations in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). However, I haven’t found a solution meets what we are trying to achieve.

In our setup, SAC is connected with a live connection to Datasphere, which includes HR data. I've attached the calculation logic that would support the chart, along with an example of how we envision the chart to look.

Requirements for the Rolling 12-Month Chart:

  • The chart should display a 12-month average, starting showing the aggregation from the first data point. For example, in the case of August 2023, the chart should include data from September 2022 to August 2023 and continue through to the end of the 12-month period (e.g., July 2024). If a time build-up is necessary (as it is when using Simple Rolling Months), is it possible to hide this initial build-up phase?
  • Ideally, we want to offer users the ability to adjust the 12-month period using a date filter. For example, they should be able to change the range from August 2023 - July 2024 to April 2023 - March 2024.

If the above is not possible, what would be an alternative solution?

Thank you.

Best regards.

entry.title: Assistance Needed: Connecting cloud PostgreSQL Instance with CAPM Application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need some help and guidance as we are currently experiencing an issue connecting cloud PostgreSQL DB instance with our CAP application.

Background: We have successfully created a PostgreSQL instance through our CAPM application. During the deployment process, the instance was generated as expected. However, we are currently facing challenges in establishing a connection between this PostgreSQL instance and our CAPM application.

Current Issue: Despite following the standard connection procedures, we are unable to connect to the PostgreSQL instance from the CAPM application. This is hindering our ability to utilize the database effectively within our application environment.

To troubleshoot the issue, we have:

1. Verified the PostgreSQL instance status to ensure it is running.

2. Checked the connection parameters (hostname, port, database name, username, and password).

If you have any insights or suggestions on how to resolve this issue, we would greatly appreciate your assistance.

Thank you for your attention to this issue. We look forward to your guidance.

Best Regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: Re: Error in BC set activation
entry.content: I guess it's an SAP BC Set. Please contact the SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Changing source of supply based on cumulative quantity
entry.content:
I would suggest to use quota arrangement. give the assign quota to supplier and supplier will be changed once it will reach to quota 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Option to restrict duplicate invoice posting via CARTA integration via CPI.
entry.content:
We have duplication issue while posting supplier invoices in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud via CARTA integration CPI.

User manually posted a supplier invoice in SAP as per the PO and the Goods receipt. The same invoice got posted in SAP automatically on the next day via CARTA integration CPI. 

If there is no available receipt line item on the PO then the invoice should not post ideally, but again another supplier invoice got posted for same PO, same amount. Is there any way whether this can restrict this duplicate posting in CPI if already an invoice got posted for the same PO in SAP.?

Thanks in Advance.

Regards

Sibin Jose

entry.title: Re: how to find the field length in SAP s4 hana Public cl...
entry.content:
Hello!
Check if the answers below can help you with this question:

  • Material master length in S4HANA public cloud
  • 2552658 - Field length in Cloud Data Sources


Have a good day!

entry.title: S4HC - Bank to Bank Transfer
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm currently doing research on how to make intercompany bank to bank transfers more efficient. Currently, our solution has been to work outside the subledger, posting to a general intercompany GL account through "Post General Journal Entry". However, we're now looking to post to AP and AR (affiliate) Subledger. 

From my preliminary research, I noticed the app "Make Bank Transfer" would offer up a suitable process, however J78 - Advanced Cash Operations is required and consequently additional licenses, which is currently cost prohibitive. 

Outside of this, my thoughts are that we complete two separate transactions, "Post outgoing payment" then "Post incoming payment". Has any one dealt with this scenario, and perhaps found a better, more streamlined process?

entry.title: Re: Managing Encryption Keys and Certificates for Better Data Security
entry.content: I'm loving this series!

entry.title: Re: RACI matrix
entry.content: Okay thank you @Margit_Wagner . I'll have a look into the learning journey

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I’m Esraa Mohsen aged 25 years old, and I’m excited to join the SAP Community Beginner Corner. I work with Edraky, where we focus on delivering comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. Our goal is to help companies effectively adopt and maximize their use of SAP solutions. As a new member of the Beginner Corner, I’m looking forward to connecting with the community, learning from experienced SAP professionals, and sharing my own insights. Please feel free to send me a private message—I’m eager to jump in and get started!

entry.title: Re: Delivery Related Billing with Batch Split

entry.title: Re: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System U...
entry.content:
Hi Greg,

Thank you for the response it is very helpful.

However, as you mentioned about ATC, could you please clarify about SI (Simplification Item check run) also whether its is needed for S/4HANA Foundation  (with Addon) system upgrade as pre-requisite activity  ?

S/4HANA Foundation 1809 have addons as SAP_CUAN and UICAN (Hybris marketing - Customer engagement Intelligence) , but as you mentioned did not find any addon specific guide available for this upgrade to S/4HANA 2023 Foundation (with hybris addons), could you please suggest here ?

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: SAP wins Gold Stevie® Award for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance in 2024
entry.content:
Although the Olympics have concluded, the award season continues for SAP.

SAP won the prestigious International Business Stevie Award, taking home the Gold award for compliance solution.

This award is won with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, a solution that enables compliance for legally mandated electronic invoicing, electronic reporting, statutory reporting, and audit requirements for 55+ countries. The solution is built on SAP Business Technology Platform.

About the solution

As global tax authorities increasingly adopt digital invoicing and reporting regulations, SAP Document and Reporting Compliance serves as a central hub for businesses to meet these evolving legal requirements. The solution supports electronic invoicing, electronic reporting, statutory reporting, and audit requirements globally, simplifying and standardizing operational processes end-to-end. Currently, it offers over 500 scenarios, up from 440 in 2023, across 58 countries.

The International Business Awards are the world’s premier business awards program. The 2024 edition received entries from organizations in 62 nations and territories.

More than 3,600 nominations from organizations of all sizes and in virtually every industry were submitted this year for consideration. 

Here are a few quotes from the Stevie Award judges:

“Errors in tax reporting are costly. Even more in companies operating worldwide. The SAP system is a must for smooth operations and auditing.”

“SAP Document and Reporting Compliance is a robust and innovative solution that streamlines compliance processes, ensuring businesses can efficiently meet local legal requirements.”

“SAP’s plans to integrate advanced AI capabilities, such as Joule, and the upcoming market-leading innovation for handling auto-populated tax returns, illustrate the company's dedication to future-proofing compliance processes.”

Stevie Award winners were determined by more than 300 executives worldwide. Details about the International Business Awards and the lists of Stevie Award winners are available at www.StevieAwards.com/IBA.

If you would like to learn more about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, join us for the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Virtual Summit 2024, a global virtual event that will take place on September 18 and 19. Learn more and register now.

About the Stevie Awards

Stevie Awards are conferred in nine programs: the Asia-Pacific Stevie Awards, the German Stevie Awards, the Middle East & North Africa Stevie Awards, The American Business Awards®, The International Business Awards®, the Stevie Awards for Women in Business, the Stevie Awards for Great Employers, the Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service, and the Stevie Awards for Technology Excellence. Stevie Awards competitions receive more than 12,000 nominations each year from organizations in more than 70 nations. Honoring organizations of all types and sizes and the people behind them, the Stevies recognize outstanding performances in the workplace worldwide. Learn more about the Stevie Awards at www.StevieAwards.com.

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications Workbook
entry.content:
Hi,

Try the blow link. I see in standard workbook we have email notifications.

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/products/emp_mng/hcm/implement/conwb/tr_wb_config_perfo.html

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
It is not the migration cockpit that does not have the feature for update. Each data migration object must pass the data to the database using an API. For equipments the used API only supports CREATE. If there would be object available that uses an API to Update the data then it would be possible. So the limitation is not with the tool migration cockpit. It is a missing object. SAP recommends to use the mass update functionality that is provided by the application. Here it is the "Find technical object" app that @mvunsharma already mentioned. Information on the app and the mass editing can be found in the help portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/3affff95fad94b9fb3b81730a5f880b1.html?locale=en-US

BR

Frank

entry.title: Re: Email Notifications Workbook
entry.content:
Hi Sachin, 

Thanks for your response. I did try that option before, but it directed me to the Digital Library, which seems to be available only for SAP employees, it displays the following message:

Sorry, requested content is already expired.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content:
Well, it's not forbidden to use an older JCo patch level. I only tried to outline the consequences of doing so. I do not recommend it.
But of course, also JCo 3.1.6 worked. The only reason for that error message on Windows
"sapjco3.dll: Can't find dependent libraries"
that I know, is that the VS 2013 C/C++ runtime libs are not installed at all, or the wrong version is installed (x64 vs x86), or maybe also the installed runtime libs are too old.
So, I recommend to double check that once again and reinstall their latest available patch level.
The download link from the JCo 3.1.6 documentation was: Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable Package

entry.title: Re: Kernel Patch to support TLSv1.3 - SAP Note 3318423
entry.content: Hi Dan, You can check with SAP, by raising the SAP support ticket.

entry.title: Re: Life Cycle Management in SAP Datasphere: Transporting Content between Tenants
entry.content:
Hello!

I have the same questions and concerns from the leslie_klinger about the SOX. What the options or tools to enable controls and governance? Thank you so much.

1 - can this be ChaRM or CALM enabled for controls and governance?

2 - is the transport mgt process similar to BTP?

3 - what reporting is available for the transport mgt processes?

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
Re: How To Do DTO in BW/4HANA Step by step
entry.content: In this example you have selected the cold connection as "SAPIQDB", do you know how to handle this if the cold storage connection is different in different environments like in DEV it is SAPIQDEV and in Pre/prod it is SAPIQQA? In this case do you know if the connection name can be changed automatically while importing the ADSO?

entry.title: Re: SAP JCo initializer error
entry.content: You're right, I just noticed i had the Microsoft Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable (x86) instead of the x64 version, I'll try with the correct one.

entry.title: Cold Store connection name change while importing the ADSO in BW4HANA
entry.content:
In the ADSO Data Tiering properties, we can enable the hot, warm and cold tiers. While selecting the cold tier, system asks for the Cold Store connection name. We have set the connection name in DEV as SAPIQDEV but the cold store connection name is different in QA environment which is SAPIQQA but while importing the ADSO from DEV to QA, the transport is failing with the message that the connection with the name SAPIQDEV does not exist. 

Is there a way where the connection name is changed automatically while importing the ADSO i.e., from SAPIQDEV to SAPIQQA?

Thanks

entry.title: How the first shortage date is calculated in Monitor material coverage app
entry.content:
I am using Monitor Material Coverage app. But have some doubts. Please explain.

My BOM

Maintain Time dependent stock app for material PPA24

This is my output screen from MMC app

MD04 screen - Material PPA24

1. How the first shortage date is calculated here for material PPA24?

MD04 for material PPB24

MD04 for Material PPC24

2. Why stock availability column is red for PPC24 only even I have the receipts and not for PPA24 & PPB24?

I referred this Link but not getting it.

3. How the below fields/ columns get calculated?

Days' Supply - current stock and the receipt and requirements information included

Stock Day supply - Only stocks and requirements. Not Planned receipts -

The day of the first shortage and the current date are taken into account for this calculation

Intraday Supply = Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

Stock Intraday Supply = Stock Days’ Supply + Fractional Coverage on the Day of the First Shortage.

4. How the below color codes got generated in respective columns.

Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels - Safety days of supply, Target days of supply

Red - Current day - First shortage days < SDOS & TDOS

Green -  SDOS < Current day - First shortage days < Target DOS

Yellow - Target DOS < Current day - First shortage days

Please provide your ideas

entry.title: Re: How to get the multiple include option for filter fie...
entry.content:
CDS Metadata extension was defined as below

@Consumption.fliter:{ selectionType:#RANGE, multipleSelection: True}

@UI.SelectionItem:{ position:10, label:"BP Number" }

Removing the multipleSelection property from @consumption.filter made it work, not sure this could be because properties were getting overwritten here as well as in BAS Annotation.xml filterRestriction.

Corrected CDS Metadata extension:

@Consumption.fliter:{ selectionType:#RANGE }

@UI.SelectionItem:{ position:10, label:"BP Number" }

@junwu thanks for your help and response 🙂

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi,

Screenshots for Task 3

All fields with search and filters 

Search with Description

Filter on Status

Thanks

entry.title: Route Schedule in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are migrating a customer from S4 On Prem to Public Cloud and currently they maintain Route Schedule (standard functionality in On Prem/Private).

The field is available in the Sales Order (Schedule Line item - Shipping tab) and in the Delivery document, however I cannot find where this is maintained in CBC or in "Implementation Activities" configuration.

Please let me know if this is not available in S4PC at this time and if there is any similar alternative.

Thanks,

Rafael Silva

entry.title: How replenishment lead time is getting calculated
entry.content:
I have kept this configuration in OPJJ for RLT calculation as per Link 


For F type materials - External procurement the calculation working properly

RLT = Purchasing processing time + Planned delivery time + GR processing time

In my case 1 + 1+ 1 = 3

But for E type - External procurement its not working.
RLT = In-house production time + GR processing time or RLT = Total replenishment lead time (MRP 3 View)
In my case I maintained TRLT = 3 days

Here the system should propose the opening date as 24.12.24 but instead 23.12.24

Also here it should propose 22.10.24 but instead 24.10.24.
The work center will work for 8 hrs per day and 1 material need 8 hrs to got produced. 
I have ran the MRP in MD01N.
Why system proposing like this?
Please let me know my expectation correct or wrong

entry.title: IDOC X DOCUMENT MATERIAL
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a table that relates the IDOC and the material document?
When I run transaction BD20, SAP already generates the material document with the stock movement.

Is there a way to get these 2 related documents?
Thanks.

entry.title: How to schedule a daily shutdown for your Steampunk system?
entry.content:
As a user of a free tier SAP BTP ABAP Environment system you are used to the fact that your free tier system will be shut down on a daily basis.  

Though one might not like this as a user of the free tier offering 😉 you might want to achieve the same behavior as an administrator for your own SAP BTP ABAP Environment test and demo systems.

Fortunately you can now find in the SAP Online Help how this behavior can be achieved.

The example 3 explains in detail the settings you have to choose

Schedule a (Recurring) Stop/Start | SAP Help Portal 

You simply schedule a stop at e.g. 10:00 PM on a daily basis, starting from today (here the day when I posted this blog post), but choose a date that is far in the future, e.g. 2099 for the system to start again and make sure that this scheduling does never end by selecting never for the end of the recurrence.

Kind regards,

Andre
